'''√h-n-sh''' ('''kahanash''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:maffick|maffick]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-n-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:maffick|maffick]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| √h-n-sh
|-
! Lemma
| kahanash
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || thihanash || jihanash || shihanash || kihanash
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || thuthuhanash || jujuhanash || shushuhanash || kukuhanash
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || thuhanash || juhanash || shuhanash || kuhanash
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || thuhanash || juhanash || shuhanash || kuhanash
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || thehanash || jehanash || shehanash || kehanash
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || thothohanash || jojohanash || shoshohanash || kokohanash
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || thohanash || johanash || shohanash || kohanash
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || thohanash || johanash || shohanash || kohanash
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || hanash || hanash || hanash || hanash
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || hanash || hanash || hanash || hanash
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || hanash || hanash || hanash || hanash
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || hanash || hanash || hanash || hanash
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || thæhanash || jæhanash || shæhanash || kæhanash
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || thathahanash || jajahanash || shashahanash || kakahanash
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || thahanash || jahanash || shahanash || kahanash
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || thahanash || jahanash || shahanash || kahanash
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || shahanash
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || goshahanash
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || gokishahanash
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || shahanashnü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || goshahanashnknü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || gokishahanashnü
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || shahanashshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || goshahanashnkshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || gokishahanashshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || shahanashro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || goshahanashnkro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || gokishahanashro
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || shahanashmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || goshahanashnkmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || gokishahanashmu
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || shahanashsher
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || goshahanashnksher
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || gokishahanashsher
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || shahanashng
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || goshahanashnkng
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || gokishahanashng
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || shahanashya
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || goshahanashnkya
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || gokishahanashya
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || shahanashyam
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || goshahanashnkyam
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || gokishahanashyam
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || shahanashnüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || goshahanashnknüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || gokishahanashnüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || shahanashnüro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || goshahanashnknüro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishahanashnüro
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || shahanashnümu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || goshahanashnknümu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || gokishahanashnümu
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || shahanashshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || goshahanashnkshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || gokishahanashshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || shahanashshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || goshahanashnkshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishahanashshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || shahanashshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || goshahanashnkshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || gokishahanashshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || shahanashronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || goshahanashnkronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || gokishahanashronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || shahanashroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || goshahanashnkroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || gokishahanashroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || shahanashromu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || goshahanashnkromu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || gokishahanashromu
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || shahanashmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || goshahanashnkmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || gokishahanashmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || shahanashmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || goshahanashnkmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || gokishahanashmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || shahanashmuro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || goshahanashnkmuro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishahanashmuro
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|d176386}}
